creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Smarty produces error messages like:
[Thu Jun 11 21:45:51 2009] [error] [client x.x.x.x] PHP Notice:  Undefined variable: _SESSION in /usr/local/share/smarty/Smarty.class.php on line 585

Fix: Apply the following patch to update the port to the new version:
How-To-Repeat: Have a website with smarty, access it and see logfile in apache.
